text:
Tassi (タッシ, Tasshi) was a member of the Xi-Yu Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 394 

Appearance

Tassi was of short stature with a pronounced hairstyle. He had a large nose, lips, and short, thick eyebrows. He wore a thin jacket and pants.

Personality

Given his eagerness to help, Tassi seemed to be a go-getter and willing to take the initiative in Mafia matters. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

After the wounded Gateaume vanishes from Room 3101 and Hinrigh's knife falls to the floor, Tassi confidently says that he will retrieve it as he walks toward the doorway. Hinrigh and two other Mafia members try to tell him to stop, but Tassi instantly vanishes once he enters the room. As Tassi finds himself standing in front of a door and is left confused, Bille suddenly appears behind him and stabs him in the neck with a knife, throwing him to the floor. Terebellum then carries his corpse to a large laundry room and drops it on a table. Montblanc and Chiffon begin to remove Tassi's clothes as they prepare to dispose of the body.
